description: Run Desiderio across every brand and market you own. The Agency tier — €149/month or €1,490/year — covers unlimited projects with a 4-hour priority response and a direct line to the maintainers. On top, the creators deliver tailored services: installation, brand-adapted theme presets, custom elements, LTS upgrades, and managed hosting. Tell us where you want to be — we set it up for you.
